skill.name: application-performance-performance-optimization
skill.description: Optimize end-to-end application performance with profiling, observability, and backend/frontend tuning. Use when coordinating performance optimization across the stack.
skill.summary: End-to-end performance optimization skill using profiling, observability, and multi-layer tuning for backend and frontend systems.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate performance optimization workflow that uses Task agents for profiling, database optimization, frontend tuning, and load testing. No dangerous patterns, external network calls, or security concerns detected.

content.value_statement: Slow applications frustrate users and hurt business metrics. This skill coordinates comprehensive performance optimization across your entire stack using profiling, observability, and targeted tuning.
actual_capabilities: Profile application performance with flame graphs, heap analysis, and I/O tracing
Establish performance baselines using APM tools like DataDog and New Relic
Optimize database queries, indexes, and caching strategies
Improve frontend bundle sizes and Core Web Vitals metrics
Configure CDN and edge caching for global performance
Conduct load testing with k6, Gatling, or Artillery
limitations: Requires access to APM tools or observability data for full effectiveness
Load testing production environments requires prior approval and safeguards
Database optimizations may require DBA review before implementation
Frontend changes may need browser compatibility testing

use_cases.title: E-commerce Performance Improvement
use_cases.description: Improve page load times and checkout conversion by optimizing frontend bundles, database queries, and CDN caching for an online store experiencing slow performance during peak traffic.

use_cases.title: SaaS Platform Scaling
use_cases.description: Prepare a B2B application for 10x user growth by establishing performance baselines, implementing monitoring, and optimizing backend services before a major product launch.

use_cases.title: Mobile App Backend Optimization
use_cases.description: Reduce API response times and improve mobile user experience by optimizing backend services, implementing caching layers, and configuring edge functions for global users.

prompt_templates.title: Quick Performance Assessment
prompt_templates.prompt: Profile the performance of my Node.js API endpoint /api/users. Identify the top 3 bottlenecks and provide specific recommendations to reduce P95 latency from 800ms to under 200ms.

prompt_templates.title: Frontend Performance Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze my React application's Core Web Vitals. The LCP is 4.2s and CLS is 0.25. Provide a prioritized list of fixes to achieve LCP under 2.5s and CLS under 0.1.

prompt_templates.title: Database Optimization Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: My PostgreSQL database has 15 slow queries taking over 2 seconds. Review the query execution plans, recommend indexes, and rewrite inefficient queries. Include caching strategy for frequently accessed data.

prompt_templates.title: Full Stack Performance Overhaul
prompt_templates.prompt: Coordinate end-to-end optimization for our SaaS platform. Start with comprehensive profiling, then optimize database queries, implement Redis caching, reduce bundle sizes, configure CDN, and set up monitoring dashboards. Target: support 5x current traffic with P95 under 500ms.

output_examples.input: Profile my API and find bottlenecks
output_examples.output: Performance profile shows: 1) Database queries averaging 450ms without indexes on user_id column, 2) N+1 queries in user list endpoint causing 2.3s response time, 3) Memory leak in session handler growing 50MB per hour. Recommended actions: Add composite index on users table, implement query batching, fix session cleanup in middleware.

LCP improved from 3.8s to 1.9s after: lazy loading below-fold images, preloading critical CSS, implementing server-side rendering for above-fold content. CLS reduced from 0.22 to 0.05 by adding explicit image dimensions and reserving space for dynamic content. Bundle size reduced 42% through code splitting.

output_examples.input: Set up load testing for checkout flow
output_examples.output: Load test results: System handles 500 req/s with P95=180ms, begins degrading at 800 req/s with P95=1.2s, error rate exceeds 1% at 1000 req/s. Bottleneck identified: database connection pool exhaustion. Recommendation: Increase pool size to 50, add read replicas, implement request queuing for peak traffic.

best_practices: Always establish performance baselines before optimization to measure actual improvement
Focus on user-centric metrics like Core Web Vitals rather than synthetic benchmarks
Implement performance budgets in CI/CD to prevent regressions from reaching production
anti_patterns: Optimizing without profiling - guessing bottlenecks instead of measuring them
Load testing production without approval and rollback procedures
Premature optimization of code paths that do not impact user experience

faq.question: What tools do I need to use this skill effectively?
faq.answer: This skill works with any APM tool (DataDog, New Relic, Prometheus) and profiling tools. For load testing, k6, Gatling, or Artillery are supported. The skill adapts to your existing observability stack.

faq.question: Can this skill optimize my application without code access?
faq.answer: No, meaningful performance optimization requires code access for profiling, identifying bottlenecks, and implementing fixes. Infrastructure-only optimizations provide limited improvements.

faq.question: How long does a typical optimization engagement take?
faq.answer: Quick wins can be identified in 1-2 days. Comprehensive optimization typically takes 2-4 weeks including profiling, implementation, load testing, and monitoring setup depending on application complexity.

faq.question: Will performance optimizations break existing functionality?
faq.answer: All changes should be tested thoroughly. The skill includes regression testing setup and recommends gradual rollout with monitoring to catch any issues early before full deployment.

faq.question: Can this skill help with mobile app performance?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill includes mobile-specific optimizations for React Native and Flutter apps, service worker implementation for PWAs, and strategies for slow network conditions.

faq.question: What performance improvements can I realistically expect?
faq.answer: Typical results include 40-60% reduction in response times, 2-3x improvement in throughput, and Core Web Vitals meeting Google's recommended thresholds. Actual results depend on starting point and system constraints.
